---
name: Content correction
about: Suggest a dictionary, grammar, translation, or publication metadata correction
title: "[Content]: "
---

## Summary

Describe the correction or proposed change.

## Area

- [ ] Dictionary entry
- [ ] Grammar lesson
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Publication metadata
- [ ] Other content

## Location

Add the relevant entry id, lesson slug, route, section title, or publication id if known.

## Current Content

Quote or describe the current wording, data, or metadata.

## Suggested Correction

Provide the proposed replacement or change.

## Source or Rationale

Include the scholarly source, editorial reasoning, or reference material behind the correction.

## Additional Notes

Anything else reviewers should know.
